findings.message: Justia blocked direct CLI/Playwright extraction with Cloudflare verification; Google Patents was accessible through Playwright Chromium. Fixture remains advisory and is not added to the deterministic CI index.
The skill should keep this as a concrete ML vehicle-control pipeline, not a generic AI classification claim.

proposed_skill_changes: Keep a regression example requiring the software-patent skill to reward source-backed AI/ML details and vehicle-control deployment while flagging field-of-use risk.
